items.title: IDE Debuggers
items.description: IDE debuggers wrap the same model (DAP) with a GUI; once you know pdb you understand 80% of what they do.

items.title: Logging for Debugging
items.description: Logging is the long-running, in-production sibling of pdb's instant-pause; both belong in your toolkit.

items.title: cProfile
items.description: pdb tells you *what* code is doing; cProfile tells you *how long* it takes.

items.title: Error & Exception Handling
items.description: Post-mortem pdb is the single fastest way to investigate uncaught exceptions.

items.title: Notebooks Best Practices
items.description: `%pdb on` and `%debug` are the notebook equivalents — same debugger, IPython sugar on top.
